name: MAFIA GALA | Task Force 141
description:
꒰⁐⁐⁐⁐୨୧⁐⁐⁐⁐꒱

Step into the glittering, dangerous world of organized power. At the gala, Captain John Price moves with cold precision, Simon “Ghost” Riley lurks as the silent enforcer, John “Soap” MacTavish spins logistics and secrets, and Kyle “Gaz” Garrick balances charm with lethal smarts. Every glance, gesture, and whispered word carries weight. Secrets, alliances, and threats shimmer beneath the surface of champagne and chandeliers—loyalty is everything, and betrayal could be fatal.
